zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Layton於1458年出生在英國越可爾斯普朗斯頓時，她的父親Sir William Layton38歲，母親Elizabeth Vorburg39歲。她於1479年與Robert Thornton在英國越可爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年40歲，埋葬在美國喬治亞包爾丁奧瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Layton于1458年出生在英国越可爾斯普朗斯頓时，她的父亲Sir William Layton38岁，母亲Elizabeth Vorburg39岁。她于1479年与Robert Thornton在英国越可爾牛頓结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年在英国英格兰越可爾享年40岁，埋葬在美国乔治亚州包爾丁奧瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Layton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leighton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Leyton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Juan Carlos, Alonso, Amalia, Ana, Carlos, Erasmo, Fernando, Jorge, Jose Carlos, Mauricio.
Spanish: altered form of Galician Leitón, a nickname meaning ‘suckling pig’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Layton was born in 1458, in Sproxton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Layton, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Vorburg, was 39. She married Robert Thornton in 1479, in Newton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1498, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Other, Paulding, Georgia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Layton est née en 1458, à Sproxton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Layton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vorburg, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Thornton en 1479, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1498, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Other, Paulding, Géorgie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Layton 1458 in Sproxton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Layton 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Vorburg 39. Sie hat 1479 in Newton, Yorkshire, England Robert Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1498 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Other, Paulding, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lei sposato Robert Thornton nel 1479, nel Newton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1498, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Other, Paulding, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Laytonが1458年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロクストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Laytonは38歳，母Elizabeth Vorburgは39歳であった。1479年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンでRobert Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで40歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ジョージア州プアウルディングオスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Layton(이)가 1458년 영국 요르크실르 스프록스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Layton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Vorburg(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 Robert Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 조지아 주 폴딩 터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Layton родилась в 1458 г. в местности спрокстон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Layton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vorburg, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Thornton в 1479 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1498 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности отир, поулдинг, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты.
